title: Count Employees in Project P1
description: Write a SQL query that returns the number of employees working in project 'P1'.
checklist: Use SELECT COUNT(*) to count rows
Provide a result alias like AS EmployeeCount
detailedInstructions: Step 1: Start with SELECT COUNT(*) to get the count of records
Step 2: Add AS EmployeeCount to label the result column
Step 4: Add WHERE clause to filter for ProjectName = 'P1'
Step 5: Execute to get the count
starterCode:
-- 1: Use SELECT COUNT(*) to count rows
-- 2: FROM EmployeeDetails
-- 3: WHERE ProjectName = 'P1'
-- 4: Add AS EmployeeCount to label result

hints.guide: Use SELECT COUNT(*) to count rows
Add AS EmployeeCount to label result
